程序包 com.example.syntaxappproject

package com.example.syntaxappproject
  • 相关程序包
    程序包
    说明
    com.example.syntaxappproject.ui
     
  • 类
    说明
    AdminBrowseEvents
    Fragment for administrators to browse all events in the system.
    AdminBrowseImages
    Fragment for administrators to browse all event posters stored in the cache.
    AdminBrowseProfiles
    Fragment where admin can browse all user profiles in the system.
    AdminCommentAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter for displaying a list of comments to admin users.
    AdminCommentAdapter.OnCommentClickListener
    Callback interface for comment click events.
    AdminEventAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter for displaying a list of events to admin users.
    AdminEventDetails
    Fragment that displays detailed information about a specific event for admin users.
    AdminImageDetails
    Fragment that displays detailed information about an event poster image for admin users.
    AdminProfileDetails
    Fragment that displays detailed user profile information for admin users.
    AuthenticationService
    Service class responsible for managing Firebase anonymous authentication in the SyntaxEvents application.
    AuthenticationService.AuthCallback
    Callback interface for receiving the result of an authentication operation.
    BulletPointHelper
    Utility class for handling bullet point input in EditText fields.
    Comment
    Model class representing a comment on an event in the SyntaxEvents application.
    CommentAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter for displaying comments in the event detail screen.
    CommentAdapter.OnCommentDeleteListener
    Callback interface for comment deletion events.
    CommentAdapter.OnCommentReportListener
    Callback interface for comment report events.
    CommentRepository
    Repository class for handling comment operations in Firestore.
    CommentRepository.CommentsCallback
    Callback interface for operations that return a list of comments.
    CommentRepository.RepositoryCallback
    Callback interface for simple repository operations (add, delete, report).
    CoOrganizerRepository
    Repository class responsible for check and add co-organizer
    CoOrganizerRepository.addCallback
    Callback interface for add operation results.
    CoOrganizerRepository.checkCallback
    Callback interface for co-organizer check results.
    CoOrganizerRepository.searchCallback
    Callback interface for search entrants results.
    CSVService
    Service class for creating and storing CSV files.
    EntrantHomeRepository
    Repository class responsible for check and add co-organizer
    EntrantHomeRepository.EventCallback
    Callback interface for operations that success return a list of events
    EntrantNameAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter for displaying a list of entrants (users) with their names and emails.
    EventAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter for displaying events for all events list recyclerview
    EventAdapter.OnItemClickListener
     
    EventAdapter.ViewHolder
    The single view of events in the list display a image and a name contain the event id.
    EventDetail
    Model class representing the detail of an event in the SyntaxEvents application.
    EventDetailRepository
    Repository class responsible for retrieving event detail data from the Firestore database.
    EventDetailRepository.EventDetailCallback
    Callback interface for operations that return data of the event
    EventFilterViewModel
    ViewModel for the filter in home page.
    EventJoinRepository
    Repository class responsible for managing event waitlist membership operations in Firebase Firestore for the SyntaxEvents application.
    EventJoinRepository.JoinCallback
    Callback interface for join and leave operations.
    EventJoinRepository.JoinCheckCallback
    Callback interface for checking waitlist membership status.
    EventLotteryRepository
    Repository class responsible for organizer-side lottery actions in Firebase Firestore for the SyntaxEvents application.
    EventLotteryRepository.LotteryActionCallback
    Callback interface for lottery actions that return a status message.
    EventLotteryRepository.SimpleCallback
    Callback interface for simple success/failure operations.
    EventViewModel
    Shared ViewModel for the event creation flow.
    ImageAdapter
    Adapter used to display image items in a RecyclerView.
    ImageCacheManager
    In-memory cache for event poster bitmaps and their Base64 strings, keyed by event ID.
    ImageItem
     
    ImageItem.ImageCallback
    Callback interface for asynchronous database retrieval
    Invitation
    Model class that represents an invitation sent to an entrant for an event.
    InvitationRepository
    Repository class responsible for reading and updating entrant invitations stored in Firebase Firestore.
    InvitationRepository.ActionCallback
    Callback for accept/decline actions.
    InvitationRepository.InvitationCallback
    Callback for reading one invitation.
    InviteEntrantAdapter
     
    InviteEntrantAdapter.OnInviteClickListener
    Listener interface for handling invite button clicks.
    MainActivity
    The Main Activity of the app
    Notification
    Model class representing a notification sent by an organizer or admin to a group of event entrants in the SyntaxEvents application.
    NotificationAdapter
    RecyclerView.Adapter for displaying Notification objects in the admin browse notifications screen and the user notification inbox.
    NotificationRepository
    Repository class responsible for managing Notification data in Firebase Firestore for the SyntaxEvents application.
    NotificationRepository.NotificationCallback
    Callback interface for success notification
    NotificationRepository.NotificationListCallback
    Callback interface for notification list
    OrganizerEventsRepository
    Repository class responsible for retrieving EventDetail data from Firebase Firestore for a specific organizer.
    OrganizerEventsRepository.EventsCallback
    Callback interface for asynchronous event retrieval operations.
    PrivateEventInvitationRepository
     
    PrivateEventInvitationRepository.SearchCallback
    Callback interface used to return matching entrant profiles and their corresponding user IDs after a search.
    PrivateEventInvitationRepository.SimpleCallback
    Callback interface used to return the success status of a repository operation.
    Profile
    Model class representing a user profile in the SyntaxEvents application.
    ProfileAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter that binds a list of Profile objects to individual profile cards in the admin user management screen.
    ProfileRepository
    Repository class responsible for managing Profile data in Firebase Firestore for the SyntaxEvents application.
    ProfileRepository.ProfileCallback
    Callback interface for operations that return a Profile.
    ProfileRepository.RepositoryCallback
    Callback interface for operations that return a success or failure result.
    QRCodeService
    Service class for generating and handling QR codes using the ZXing library.
    R
